title: Sky Bride
writer: Joseph L. Mankiewicz, Agnes Brand Leahy, Grover Jones
actors: Richard Arlen, Jack Oakie, Virginia Bruce
plot: Barnstorming pilots Speed Condon, Bill Adams, and Eddie Smith travel the country with their manager, Alec Dugan, performing at fairs and air shows and hawking rides for the locals. But when Speed's rambunctious flying results in t...
